channel.title: Webgl on allokkio
channel.description: Recent content in Webgl on allokkio

item.title: Sketch: 3D Test
item.description: Adopted from the coding train (who adopted it from bees & bombs). // actual script --------------------------------------------------------------- let angle = 0; let w = 35; let ma; let maxD function setup() { let canvas = createCanvas(400, 400, WEBGL); canvas.parent('sketch-holder'); ma = atan(cos(QUARTER_PI)); maxD = dist(0,0, 200,200) } function draw() { background("#EEEDE4"); ortho(-400, 400, -400, 400, 0, 1000); rotateX(-QUARTER_PI); rotateY(ma); let offset = 0; for (let z = 0; z
